stop_reason: incumbent did not reach the Rung-1 matched reference within the 90% reach band (R-2026-06-B §15)
diagnosis: The budget-only escalation (300k -> 900k, nothing else changed) FALSIFIES the under-trained-but-converging hypothesis. Success is non-monotonic across the budget: 67% (300k) -> 75% (450k) -> 50% (600k) -> 42% (750k) -> 83% (900k); not a steady climb. The failure mode FLIPPED: at 300k the misses were pure transport precision (centroid 0.116-0.135 m, every tilt/stress conjunct passing); at 900k transport is solved (the 2 misses sit at centroid 0.012-0.016 m, essentially on the goal) but they now FAIL the unstressed conjunct (max_stress 133-134 N > the 130 N COCARRY_STRESS_MAX_PROXY_N limit) -- the policy traded transport precision for excess internal squeeze. The intermediate checkpoints wander through grossly constraint-violating regions (tilt_max 27.9 deg at 600k; stress_p90 298 N at 750k). The per-episode reward slope stays positive but the per-step trend is essentially flat in the last third (~2.3e-7/step); reward rose 0.125 -> 0.207 mean but success did not track it. The 10 successes at 900k are constraint-clean (stress < 130 N, tilt < 15 deg on every one); only the 2 stress-violating seeds break the band. Conclusion: more frames do not cleanly buy >=90% -- they exchange one constraint margin for another under an unstable optimisation. Per the pre-committed rule the reference is NOT lowered and nothing is frozen. The disciplined next step is NOT more budget; the escalation ladder (terminal-approach PBRS, then curriculum, then residual-on-impedance) plus addressing the stress/transport trade-off and optimisation stability is a founder decision -- surfaced, not taken here.
freezable_blockers: success 83% < the 90% reach band of the 100% matched reference
eval stress_p90 132 N > the 130 N COCARRY_STRESS_MAX_PROXY_N limit (seeds 10000, 10004 fail the unstressed conjunct at near-zero centroid)
